etherCtSmall02.label: Safe Haven
etherCtSmall02.desc: Chance per floor for debuffs to be disabled

etherCtSmall03.label: Soul Valuation
etherCtSmall03.desc: Increased monster Magic Find in Chaos Tower floors

etherCtSmall05.label: Chaotic Population Increase
etherCtSmall05.desc: Increased amount of monsters per floor

etherCtSmall06.label: The Tower´s Presence
etherCtSmall06.desc: Increased chance to find a Chaos Tower

etherCtBig02.label: Whispering of the Colosseum
etherCtBig02.desc: Chance per floor to drop a Colosseum Fragment

etherCtBig04.label: Divine Blessing
etherCtBig04.desc: Gain an additional Chaos Tower buff

etherCtBig05.label: Ying & Yang
etherCtBig05.desc: Gain two additional Chaos Tower buffs doubling the effectiveness of all your debuffs

etherCtBig06.label: Raging Chaos
etherCtBig06.desc: Increased monster movement speed inside Chaos Tower

etherCtBig07.label: Tower Revelation
etherCtBig07.desc: Chaos Tower is always revealed on the map

etherCpSmall01.label: Conjuring Darkness
etherCpSmall01.desc: Increased spawn chance of Chaos Pillars

etherCpSmall02.label: Density of Evil
etherCpSmall02.desc: Increases the chance of higher tier Chaos Pillars

etherCpSmall04.label: Dwelling Evil
etherCpSmall04.desc: Increased amount of monsters spawned by Chaos Pillar

etherCpSmall06.label: Hierarchy of Chaos
etherCpSmall06.desc: Chance for monsters to spawn as higher rarity

etherCpSmall07.label: Step in the Dark
etherCpSmall07.desc: Gain increased movement speed for a short duration when opening a Chaos Pillar

etherCpBig02.label: Chaotic Aftershock
etherCpBig02.desc: Chance for a Chaos Pillar to activate twice

etherCpBig03.label: Evil Within The Chaos
etherCpBig03.desc: Chance for a Chaos Pillar to have boss materials affix

etherCpBig04.label: Glimmering Darkness
etherCpBig04.desc: Chance for a Chaos Pillar to have a unique items affix

etherCpBig05.label: Relic Infused Chaos
etherCpBig05.desc: Chance for a Chaos Pillar to have the relic affix

etherCpBig06.label: Prayer For Darkness
etherCpBig06.desc: Gain a random Shrine Buff when opening a Chaos Pillar

etherMinSmall03.label: Abundance of Materials
etherMinSmall03.desc: Increases the chance of an ore node to spawn as a rich or an overflowing vein.

etherMinSmall04.label: Lucky Hit
etherMinSmall04.desc: Chance to do a lucky hit rolling till failior, dropping additional ore for each successful roll.

etherMinSmall05.label: Swift Labour
etherMinSmall05.desc: Gain movement phasing and stacking movement speed after mining a node.

etherMinSmall07.label: Jewelry Within
etherMinSmall07.desc: Chance to drop an Uncut Jewel when mining an ore node.

etherMinBig01.label: Goblin Patrol
etherMinBig01.desc: Chance to get ambushed by Ore Goblins that drop ore and materials based on the mined node.

etherMinBig02.label: Careful Extraction
etherMinBig02.desc: Chance for the ore node to not break upon mining and become mineable again.

etherMinBig03.label: Divine Luck
etherMinBig03.desc: Chance for a Gold and Ruby ore node to randomly drop any Tarot Card.

etherMinBig04.label: Pristine Extraction
etherMinBig04.desc: Chance to drop a Pristine Gem from an overflowing vein.

etherEBSmall01.label: The Call to War
etherEBSmall01.desc: Increased chance to spawn an Eternal Battlefield in your maps.

etherEBSmall02.label: Tokens of Battle
etherEBSmall02.desc: Increased chance to drop Battle Fragments from monsters spawned by Eternal Battlefield.

etherEBSmall03.label: Growing Mayhem
etherEBSmall03.desc: Increases the amount of monsters spawned by the Eternal Battlefield.

etherEBSmall04.label: Legion of War
etherEBSmall04.desc: Chance for monsters from Eternal Battlefield to spawn as higher rarity.

etherEBSmall05.label: Blitzkrieg
etherEBSmall05.desc: Increases the speed of which Eternal Battlefield opens and closes causing monsters to be spawned faster.

etherEBBig01.label: The Key to Battle
etherEBBig01.desc: Chance for ancient monsters from Eternal Battlefield portal event to drop a stack of battle fragments when killed.

etherEBBig02.label: Never Ending Conflict
etherEBBig02.desc: Chance for Eternal Battlefield to restart after cleared. This effect can only occur once.

etherEBBig03.label: Mirror Execution
etherEBBig03.desc: Chance to clone Sung Lee inside Eternal Battlefield. Double the suffering, double the reward.

etherEBBig04.label: Encore of War
etherEBBig04.desc: Chance to spawn an additional Eternal Battlefield portal instead of portal to town after killing sung lee.

etherEBBig05.label: Spoils of War
etherEBBig05.desc: Increased chance to drop rare materials from the Eternal Battle Field zone.

etherSRSmall01.label: Whispering Shadows
etherSRSmall01.desc: Increased chance to spawn a Shadow Realm in your maps.

etherSRSmall02.label: Dimensional Abundance
etherSRSmall02.desc: Increased chance to drop dimensional shards from monsters within the Shadow Realm.

etherSRSmall03.label: Dwelling Shadows
etherSRSmall03.desc: Increases the size of monster packs within the Shadow Realm.

etherSRBig01.label: Shadow Carriers
etherSRBig01.desc: Ancient monsters within the Shadow Realm have a chance to respawn as shadow goblins.

etherSRBig02.label: Black Market Hierarchy
etherSRBig02.desc: Increases the chance of Veras to spawn as a higher tier merchant.

etherSRBig03.label: Key to the Shadows
etherSRBig03.desc: Chance for ancient monsters within the Shadow Realm to drop a stack of dimensional shards.

etherSRBig04.label: Twice the Shadows
etherSRBig04.desc: Chance to clone Shade of Death within Reaper´s Breach. Double the suffering, double the reward.

etherPeSmall01.label: Presence of Evil
etherPeSmall01.desc: Increased chance to drop Prime Evil parts from Act Bosses.

etherPeSmall02.label: Unholy Luck
etherPeSmall02.desc: Chance to double the amount of Prime Evil parts dropped from Act Bosses.

etherPeSmall03.label: Guardians of Evil
etherPeSmall03.desc: Increases the Magic Find of monsters inside Act Boss dungeons.

etherPeSmall04.label: Prime Treasure
etherPeSmall04.desc: Chance to spawn a Ruby Chest after killing an Act Boss.

etherPeBig01.label: The Key of Terror
etherPeBig01.desc: Chance to drop a Key of Terror when killing an Act Boss.

etherPeBig02.label: Manifesting Cycle
etherPeBig02.desc: Act Bosses gain the chance to drop a Prime Evil part from the next boss in the cycle.

etherPeBig03.label: Unkillable Evil
etherPeBig03.desc: Chance for an Act Boss to respawn after being killed.

etherPeBig04.label: Soul Sacrifice
etherPeBig04.desc: You can no longer drop Prime Evil parts from Act Bosses, but double the chances to drop a Soul Gem.

etherPeBig05.label: Son of Lucifer
etherPeBig05.desc: Chance to clone Damien within Fallen Inoya. Double the suffering, double the reward.

etherOwSmall01.label: Presence of Evil
etherOwSmall01.desc: Increases the chance of chests in Overworld zones containing a Mimic.

etherOwSmall02.label: Sonya´s Hunt
etherOwSmall02.desc: Increases the chance of Overworld monsters dropping Dungeon Keys when killed.

etherOwSmall03.label: Heimdall´s Blessing
etherOwSmall03.desc: Increases the chance of Overworld monsters dropping Bifröst Keys when killed.

etherOwSmall04.label: Realm of Angels
etherOwSmall04.desc: Chance for Overworld monsters to spawn with the Fallen Angel affix.

etherOwBig01.label: Treasure Chests
etherOwBig01.desc: Ancient monsters in Overworld zones have a chance to drop a Chest when killed.

etherOwBig02.label: Vengeful Goblins
etherOwBig02.desc: Ancient monsters in Overworld zones have a chance to respawn as a random Goblin when killed.

etherOwBig03.label: The Guardian´s of Hell
etherOwBig03.desc: Chance for Overworld monsters to spawn with the Guardian of Hell affix.

etherOwBig04.label: Back to Basics
etherOwBig04.desc: Increased Total Magic Find in Overworld maps but you no longer spawn any mechanics in your maps.

etherUrSmall01.label: Unstable Presence
etherUrSmall01.desc: Increased chance to spawn an Unstable Rift on your maps.

etherUrSmall02.label: Material Unstability
etherUrSmall02.desc: Monsters within Unstable Rift have an increased chance of dropping Unstable Dust when killed.

etherUrSmall03.label: Essence Vaults
etherUrSmall03.desc: Monsters within Unstable Rift have an increased chance of dropping Essence Vaults when killed.

etherUrSmall04.label: Orbital Stability
etherUrSmall04.desc: Ancient monsters within the Unstable Rift have a chance to be respawned as Orb Goblins.

etherUrSmall05.label: Not Unstable Enough
etherUrSmall05.desc: Chance for monster packs to have extra monsters within Unstable Rift.

etherUrBig01.label: Glitched Timeline
etherUrBig01.desc: Chance to be warped into Asgard when entering an Unstable Rift.

etherUrBig02.label: Chaotic Fortune
etherUrBig02.desc: Increased chance to warp into Rift of Fortune when entering an Unstable Rift.

etherUrBig03.label: Unstable Conquest
etherUrBig03.desc: Guaranteed tier 4 Challenge Dungeon when being warped into a dungeon.

etherUrBig04.label: Mirror of Unstability
etherUrBig04.desc: Chance to duplicate any Unique Item drops within the Unstable Rift, the additional item is Mirrored.

etherDngSmall01.label: Bloated Dungeon
etherDngSmall01.desc: Increases the size of monster packs in Dungeons.

etherDngSmall02.label: Bypassing the Lock
etherDngSmall02.desc: Chance to not consume the Dungeon Keys when entering a Challenge Dungeon.

etherDngSmall03.label: Finding the Key
etherDngSmall03.desc: Monsters within the Dungeon have an increased chance of dropping a Key for that Dungeon.

etherDngSmall04.label: Valuable Dungeon
etherDngSmall04.desc: Increases the Magic Find of monsters inside Dungeons.

etherDngBig01.label: Not Challenging Enough?
etherDngBig01.desc: Increased Challenge Dungeon buffs and debuffs

etherDngBig02.label: Dwelling Treasure Chest
etherDngBig02.desc: Chance to open the Challenge Dungeon chest an additional time.

etherDngBig03.label: Colossal Mimicry
etherDngBig03.desc: Chance for the Challenge Dungeon chest to spawn a Colossal Mimic.

etherDngBig04.label: Peak Valuation
etherDngBig04.desc: Increases the chance of dropping High Quality Materials from the Challenge Dungeon chest.

etherRgSmall01.label: Ruby Treasure
etherRgSmall01.desc: Chance to increase the amount of times chests are opened within Ruby Gardens.

etherRgSmall02.label: Fortune of the Garden
etherRgSmall02.desc: Dragon monsters in Ruby Gardens gain increased Magic Find.

etherRgSmall04.label: Garden Goblins
etherRgSmall04.desc: Chance to spawn Treasure Goblins when opening a Ruby Chest within Ruby Gardens.

etherRgBig01.label: Garden´s Blessing
etherRgBig01.desc: Chance to spawn up to 10 additional Ruby Chests in Ruby Gardens.

etherRgBig02.label: Chaotic Endrixia
etherRgBig02.desc: Endrixia gains increased Life and Damage but has a chance to drop an Unholy or Angelic Charm.

etherRgBig03.label: Dragon´s Slumber
etherRgBig03.desc: Spawn five Ruby Chests where Endrixia would spawn. Endrixia no longer spawns.

etherUSSmall01.label: Unholy Sieging
etherUSSmall01.desc: Increased chance to spawn an Unholy Siege in the map.

etherUSSmall02.label: Unholy Magic Find
etherUSSmall02.desc: Increased Magic Find on monsters from Unholy Siege

etherUSSmall03.label: Unholy Cards
etherUSSmall03.desc: Increased chance for Unholy Siege monsters to drop Tarot Cards

etherCSBig01.label: Cursed Swarm
etherCSBig01.desc: Chance for an additional monster pack per spawn

etherCSSmall01.label: Cursed Lands
etherCSSmall01.desc: Increased chance to spawn Cursed Spirit in the map

etherCSSmall02.label: Timecursed Entities
etherCSSmall02.desc: Increased life time replenished per monster kill

etherCSSmall04.label: Stacked Magic Find
etherCSSmall04.desc: Increased Magic Find from wave clears

etherSRBig05.label: Fortune of Shadows
etherSRBig05.desc: Increased Total Magic Find in Shadow Realm.

etherUrBig05.label: Warped Fortune
etherUrBig05.desc: Increased Total Magic Find inside Unstable Rift.
